input: Customer says: I did not make this transfer, I lost access to my account, and the attacker changed my phone number.
Customer asks whether invoice INV-2026-004 was paid and says they do not need any changes.
Customer threatens legal action unless all personal data is deleted today, but also asks for a refund for last month.
Customer says they accidentally bought the wrong plan five minutes ago and wants money back.
The message contains only: thanks, I solved it myself.
Customer writes: something feels weird with my account but I cannot explain it. No money is missing yet.
